skill.name: business-contact-social-links-skill
skill.description: This skill helps users automatically extract official website and social media profiles. Agent should proactively apply this skill when users express needs like search for official website and social media contacts of a company, find YouTube and LinkedIn profiles by company name, extract social media links from a specific website URL, discover a company's X and Facebook presence, gather business contact details using their brand name, retrieve TikTok and Instagram links from a target website, track competitor social media strategy, extract multi-platform social links for lead generation, find official contact channels of local businesses, collect canonical profile URLs for outreach campaigns, or build a contact database from Yellow Pages leads.
skill.summary: Extract official websites and social media links for any company or domain using BrowserAct automation.
skill.author: browser-act

security_audit.summary: Security evaluation confirmed all static findings are false positives. The skill uses standard patterns for API integration: HTTP requests to BrowserAct API (lines 50, 77, 105), environment variable access for API key configuration (line 122), and Python script execution for workflow automation. No malicious intent detected. No prompt injection attempts found.

low_findings.title: HTTP Request Libraries Used
low_findings.description: Python requests library is used for API calls to BrowserAct service. This is legitimate API integration with proper Bearer token authentication. Not credential exfiltration.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Direct evidence shows requests.post/get calls are made to api.browseract.com with proper Authorization header. API key is sent to legitimate service endpoint.

low_findings.title: API Key Environment Variable Access
low_findings.description: os.getenv('BROWSERACT_API_KEY') is standard pattern for API configuration. Key is used only with BrowserAct API, not exfiltrated.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Evidence shows API key is read from environment and used in Bearer token for BrowserAct API calls only.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded Service URLs
low_findings.description: API endpoints point to api.browseract.com - legitimate third-party service. Error messages reference browseract.com for user guidance.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: All URLs point to browseract.com domain. No suspicious external domains detected.

low_findings.title: Command-Line Argument Parsing
low_findings.description: Script accepts target input via sys.argv - standard pattern for CLI tools. Input is validated and routed to correct template.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: sys.argv usage is standard Python CLI pattern. Arguments are validated before being passed to API.

content.user_title: Extract Business Contact & Social Media Links
content.value_statement: Finding company websites and social media profiles manually is time-consuming. This skill automates extraction of official contacts and social links for any company or domain using BrowserAct workflows.
actual_capabilities: Extract official website URL from a company name using Google search
Scrape all social media profile links from any website URL
Support for LinkedIn, Facebook, X/Twitter, Instagram, YouTube, and TikTok
Auto-detect whether input is a company name or website URL
Return structured JSON with platform names and canonical URLs
Handle API authentication and polling for task completion
limitations: Requires a BrowserAct API key with active credits
Cannot extract social links from websites requiring login
Rate limits depend on BrowserAct plan tier
Complex CAPTCHAs or anti-bot protections may affect results

use_cases.title: Sales Teams Build Lead Lists
use_cases.description: Sales representatives use this skill to quickly gather official websites and social channels for prospects. They input a list of company names and get structured contact data for outreach campaigns.

use_cases.title: Researchers Gather Digital Footprints
use_cases.description: Market researchers extract social media presence data for competitor analysis. They provide website URLs and receive platform-by-platform social profile links to assess digital strategy.

use_cases.title: Recruiters Find Company Social Presence
use_cases.description: Recruiters use this skill to verify a company's digital presence before engaging. They input company names to confirm active social channels and assess employer brand visibility.

prompt_templates.title: Find contacts for a company
prompt_templates.prompt: Find the official website and social media profiles for {company_name}
prompt_templates.scenario: Basic usage - provide a company name and get all contact links

prompt_templates.title: Extract social links from a website
prompt_templates.prompt: Scrape all social media links from {website_url}
prompt_templates.scenario: When you have a specific website URL and want to find their social profiles

prompt_templates.title: Enrich a list of companies
prompt_templates.prompt: For each of these companies, extract their official website and social media links: {company_list}
prompt_templates.scenario: Bulk enrichment - process multiple company names

prompt_templates.title: Verify competitor social presence
prompt_templates.prompt: Compare the social media presence of {company_a} versus {company_b}

output_examples.input: Find the official website and social media profiles for OpenAI

best_practices: Provide clear company names for best results - avoid abbreviations when possible
Include the full website URL when you have it for more accurate social link extraction
Check BrowserAct API key validity if tasks fail to start
anti_patterns: Do not provide partial or misspelled company names - results will be inaccurate
Do not use URLs with login requirements - extraction will fail
Do not exceed concurrent task limits - check your BrowserAct plan

faq.question: What API key do I need for this skill?
faq.answer: You need a BrowserAct API key. Get one from https://www.browseract.com/reception/integrations and set it as the BROWSERACT_API_KEY environment variable.

faq.question: Can I use a company name or a website URL?
faq.answer: Both work. The skill auto-detects whether your input is a URL (starts with http/https/www) or a company name, then routes to the correct workflow template.

faq.question: Which social media platforms are supported?
faq.answer: The skill extracts links for LinkedIn, Facebook, X/Twitter, Instagram, YouTube, and TikTok.

faq.question: How long does extraction take?
faq.answer: Tasks typically complete within a few minutes. The script polls for completion and reports status with timestamps.

faq.question: What happens if my API key is invalid?
faq.answer: The script will output an 'Invalid authorization' error. Check that your BROWSERACT_API_KEY environment variable is set correctly.

faq.question: Can I extract social links from any website?
faq.answer: Most websites work. However, sites requiring login, displaying CAPTCHAs, or blocking bots may not return complete results.
